query: SELECT c.code, c.title, c.totalLessons, COUNT(l.id) as actualLessons FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.displayOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.code, c.title, c.totalLessons, COUNT(l.id) as actualLessons FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.displayOrder;
